---
title: "Mastodon: An Introduction for Beginners and for Scientists"
description: "A guide to Mastodon for scientists, and a hope that Sigmoid.social makes the list."
author: synesis
date: "2022-11-09"
categories: [Mastodon]
image: mastodon-intro.jpg
---

![](mastodon-intro.jpg)

Giorgio Gilestro wrote an excellent guide for scientists to the world of Mastodon. [[1]](#ref-1) Hopefully Sigmoid.social (where I am) can be included in the list.

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_mastodon-an-introduction-for-beginners-and-activity-6995917336922787840-TKl_).*

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Gilestro, Giorgio. "Mastodon: An Introduction for Beginners and for Scientists." <https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-022-03668-7>
